name: Pain Au Sucre (Sugar House Maple Toast)
recipeIngredient: 6 slices whole wheat or French bread
1 cup soft or grated maple sugar, up to 1 1/2 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the bread on one side.
2. Butter the untoasted side.
3. Sprinkle generously with the sugar, without going too near the edges.
4. Place on broiler, 4 inches away from the source of heat and broil until the sugar melts and bubbles.
5. Set each toast on a plate.
6. Sprinkle chopped nuts to taste on top.
7. Pour cream over all.
